query: SELECT id, bookTitle, authorName FROM book_profiles WHERE bookTitle LIKE '%Misbehaving%' ORDER BY bookTitle;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT id, bookTitle, authorName FROM book_profiles WHERE bookTitle LIKE '%Misbehaving%' ORDER BY bookTitle;

rows.bookTitle: Misbehaving The Making of Behavior Economics by Richard H. Thaler

id	bookTitle	authorName
